---
title: "Natalie Smith"
image: headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 30em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/natsmith/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/plantsmith
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:nasmith@bren.ucsb.edu
---

## About me

Hi! My name is Natalie. I'm fascinated by the intersection of the natural and built environment and am passionate about biodiversity, connectivity, climate adaptation, and data science. I am currently pursuing a master's degree at the Bren School of Environmental Science & Management (UCSB), where I specialize in Conservation Planning with an emphasis on climate and data science.

## Education

Master of Environmental Science and Management \| 2025 \| Bren School Of Environmental Science & Management at UCSB

Bachelor of Music \| Berklee College of Music

## Certifications

Leed Green Associate \| 2023

Wildfire Defense Professional (USGBC-LA) \| 2022

California Native Plant Landscaper Certificate (CNPLC) \| 2021

Horticulture (UCLA Extension) \| 2020
